title: Fire AI Secures Pre-Seed Funding from Venture Catalysts
full_text: # Fire AI Secures Pre-Seed Funding from Venture Catalysts. Jul 16, 2025 | By Yan li. Fire AI, a startup that helps businesses with automation and data analysis through conversation-based tools, has raised money in a pre-seed funding round. The round was led by Venture Catalysts and included support from key investors like Gaurav Khatri (Co-founder and CEO of Noise) and Amit Kumar Singh (former MD of Central Warehousing Corporation). Founded by Vipul Prakash, a former product and growth leader at Zomato, Delhivery, and BharatPe, Fire AI is building a unified platform that integrates descriptive, diagnostic, predictive, and prescriptive analytics to help businesses derive insights from data in a seamless, user-friendly manner. Commenting on the investment, Apoorva Ranjan Sharma, Co-founder and Managing Director of Venture Catalysts, said "Fire AI stands as the next frontier in business intelligence, combining the power of artificial intelligence with a deep understanding of enterprise needs. Vipul Prakash, Founder and CEO of Fire AI, said the funding validates the company's mission. / score=0.227 / query=AI workflow automation startup raises venture funding 2026 / intent=find_startups / path=capital_startup

# Fire AI Secures Pre-Seed Funding from Venture Catalysts.
Fire AI, a startup that helps businesses with automation and data analysis through conversation-based tools, has raised money in a pre-seed funding round.
The round was led by Venture Catalysts and included support from key investors like Gaurav Khatri (Co-founder and CEO of Noise) and Amit Kumar Singh (former MD of Central Warehousing Corporation).

Founded by Vipul Prakash, a former product and growth leader at Zomato, Delhivery, and BharatPe, Fire AI is building a unified platform that integrates descriptive, diagnostic, predictive, and prescriptive analytics to help businesses derive insights from data in a seamless, user-friendly manner.
